data.title: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Admits $204M Crypto Super PAC Wouldn't Exist If Gary Gensler Wasn't The SEC Chair
data.description: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse said on Sunday that the establishment of Fairshake, a cryptocurrency-focused super political action committee, was a direct response to the SEC’s approach toward the industry under Gary Gensler.

data.title: Google Sues Federal Agency For Supervising Payments App That No Longer Exists
data.description: The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau has ordered federal supervision of Alphabet Inc.'s  Google Payment Corp on Friday, Dec. 6, 2024.

data.title: Elon Musk's Mom Maye Says She Likes To 'Sit In On Meetings' With Her Son And Ramaswamy, Says 'Wealthy' And 'Billionaire' Are Degrading Words
Donald Trump Shifts Stance On Jerome Powell, Says No Immediate Plans To Replace Fed Chair: 'I Don't Think So'
data.description: President-elect Donald Trump said on Sunday, that he has no immediate plans to remove Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell after getting elected in November, marking a notable shift in his stance toward the central bank leader ahead of a crucial December Fed meeting.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Reverse After Advances: BTC Records Historic Weekly Close While Analyst Paints $6K Target For ETH
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies slipped in overnight trading on Sunday after Bitcoin recorded its first-ever weekly close above $100,000.
